description: Composition100% polo t-shirt in black and white stripes. Multi-colored auto striped single jersey ribbed V-placket polo tee, with pocket and slits at the bottom.FittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery. Going traditional with the colour combination of black and white, this polo t-shirt from classic polo has an all-season flavour. Wear it  with smart casuals for outings with friends.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18"
